raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California voters recently rejected Proposition 25, a no-money bail system.",
    "SB 262 would create a $0 bail system despite the rejection by voters.",
    "There has been a significant increase in violent crimes such as homicide and domestic violence.",
    "Policies like zero-bail have led to criminals being released back into the community only to reoffend.",
    "Zero-bail policies have created a 'catch-and-release' system for violent and dangerous criminals.",
    "There is concern that a zero-bail system will allow violent criminals to be released back onto the streets.",
    "There must be bail guidelines for violent and dangerous crimes to ensure community safety."
  ]
}
```
